ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US size equivalent */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* EU size equivalent */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "hollow_to_floor" REAL /* Hollow to floor measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size conversion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size conversion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_us_size FOREIGN KEY ("us_size") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_eu_size FOREIGN KEY ("eu_size") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_uk_size FOREIGN KEY ("uk_size") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., United States, European Union, United Kingdom) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart rule */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line the rule applies to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the rule applies to */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart rule */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rule is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_rules_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_rules_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in inches */,
  "hollow_to_floor" REAL /* Hollow to floor measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the recommendation belongs to */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line the recommendation is for */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the recommendation is for */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product ordered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status history entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the status update belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status update was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the feedback is for */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line the trend is for */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the trend is for */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size that is trending */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of times the size has been converted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trend was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_trends_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)
